mermaidSyntax:
graph TD A[PI Writes Grant Application
R01 or R21] --> B[Institution Grants Office
Compliance Checks] B --> C[NIH Center for Scientific Review
Receives Application] C --> D[Study Section Assignment] C --> E[Program Officer Assigned
NIMH/NCI/etc.] D --> F[Study Section Review
External Scientists] F --> G[Scoring: 1-9 Scale
Significance, Innovation, Approach,
Investigators, Environment] G --> H[Study Section Meeting
Top 50% Discussed
Primary/Secondary/Tertiary Reviewers] H --> I[Percentile Scores Calculated] I --> J[Advisory Council Review
Funding Decision] J --> K{Funded?} K -->|Yes| L[Grants Management Specialist
Budget Negotiation] K -->|No| M[PI May Revise &
Resubmit Once] M --> B style K fill:#f59e0b,stroke:#d97706,color:#000 style L fill:#10b981,stroke:#059669,color:#fff style M fill:#ef4444,stroke:#b91c1c,color:#fff
